found.quote: Vendor will defend Customer against third-party claims only to the extent finally determined by a court to arise from Vendor's willful misconduct.
If Customer ends an Order Form without Vendor default, Customer will pay an exit charge equal to the full unpaid balance for that Order Form.
Each Order Form has the initial term stated in it and will not automatically extend unless Customer signs a renewal order or gives written approval for a renewal period of one year or less.
Vendor will maintain insurance it determines is commercially reasonable, including general liability coverage of at least $250,000 per occurrence if available on commercially reasonable terms.
